questions.q: Write a notice for the students to attend a seminar on 'Career Choices' in the school auditorium.
questions.answer:
NOTICE

To all students,

A seminar on 'Career Choices' will be held in the school auditorium on 10th March, 2024 at 10:00 a.m. We request all students to attend the seminar and make the most of this opportunity.

questions.q:
Read the following notice and answer the questions that follow:

NOTICE

The School Management has decided to change the timings of the school from 9:00 a.m. to 8:00 a.m. from 1st April, 2024 onwards. All students are required to be present in their respective classrooms by 7:45 a.m. for roll call.
Write a notice for the students to participate in a 'Book Fair' on the school premises.
questions.answer:
NOTICE

To all students,

A 'Book Fair' will be held on the school premises from 15th February, 2024 to 20th February, 2024. We request all students to participate in the fair and make a purchase of their favourite books.

questions.q:
Read the following notice and answer the question that follows:

NOTICE

All students are required to return their library books by 31st December, 2023. Failure to return the books on time will result in a fine.
Write a notice for the students to participate in a 'Science Exhibition' on the school premises.
questions.answer:
NOTICE

To all students,

A 'Science Exhibition' will be held on the school premises on 20th January, 2024. We request all students to participate in the exhibition and showcase their scientific projects.

questions.q:
Read the following notice and answer the question that follows:

NOTICE

The school will remain closed on 15th August, 2024 on account of Independence Day.
Write a notice for the students to attend a 'Workshop on Environmental Conservation' in the school auditorium.
questions.answer:
NOTICE

To all students,

A 'Workshop on Environmental Conservation' will be held in the school auditorium on 25th March, 2024 at 10:00 a.m. We request all students to attend the workshop and contribute to environmental conservation.

questions.q:
Read the following notice and answer the question that follows:

NOTICE

The school will observe 'Cleanliness Week' from 10th February, 2024 to 17th February, 2024. All students are required to participate in the cleanliness drive.
Write a notice for the students to participate in a 'Drawing Competition' on the school premises.
questions.answer:
NOTICE

To all students,

A 'Drawing Competition' will be held on the school premises on 28th January, 2024. We request all students to participate in the competition and showcase their artistic skills.

questions.q:
Read the following notice and answer the question that follows:

NOTICE

The school will remain closed on 26th January, 2024 on account of Republic Day.
